crons._comment: Every 10 min keeps publish latency reasonable (scheduled posts go out within 10 min) while halving DB wake-ups vs the previous every-5.
Daily 14:00 UTC AI-generated batch per active client.
Metrics fetched 4x/day instead of hourly — engagement counts aren't time-critical and the Neon free plan rewards fewer wake-ups.
Drains the silverback_outbox. Was every minute (1,440/day on Neon); now every 3 minutes (480/day) — events still get out within a few minutes, compute usage drops ~66%.
